nasb.text: and to keep the Lord’s commandments and His statutes which I am commanding you today for your good?

esv.text: and to keep the commandments and statutes of the Lord, which I am commanding you today for your good?

cnv.text: 遵守耶和華的誡命和律例，就是我今日吩咐你的，為要叫你得福。

ccb.text: 遵守祂的诫命和律例。我今天把这些诫命和律例赐给你们，是为了你们的益处。
